# RepMatch

> Calculate equivalent barbell sets for any rep range. Input your max lift, roll a random rep count, and see what weight each lifter should use for equal relative effort. Built for friends who want to compete at the gym.

## How It Works

RepMatch uses the Epley formula (the most common 1RM estimator) to calculate equivalent effort across rep ranges. Enter your known max lift (weight x reps), set a rep range, and roll a random rep target. The app calculates the weight each lifter needs to match that effort level.

## Features

- 1-5 lifters can input their max simultaneously
- Random rep generation within a user-defined range
- Weights rounded to nearest 5 lb (or 2.5 kg) for practical loading
- Percentage of 1RM shown alongside weights
- lb/kg unit toggle

## Pages

- [Home](https://repmatch.netlify.app/) — The calculator tool
